comment: custom9s SIMPLE 2-zone CONSTRUCTIVE lab held-out benchmark (20 scenarios, 5 per sun rank). Same balanced 2-zone set as default custom lab. Targets Z1=bright(3), Z2=medium(2). Sun ranks via bounds [50,150,500]. RANK 0 (Sunshine=0 lux, no natural light).
description: sun=0, both zones dark, all actuators off
sun=0, Z1 below target, Z2 at target(rank2)
sun=0, both zones bright, all lights on (must decrease Z2)
sun=0, Z1 below target, Z2 above target
sun=0, Z1 rank1 (need rank3), Z2 rank1 (need rank2), Z1Light already on

comment: === SUNSHINE RANK 1 (Sunshine=75 lux, low natural light) ===
description: sun=1, both zones dark, all actuators off
sun=1, Z1 below target, Z2 at target
sun=1, both bright, all actuators on (must decrease Z2 only)
sun=1, Z1 below target, Z2 above target
sun=1, both rank1, Z1 blinds already open but only low sun available

comment: === SUNSHINE RANK 2 (Sunshine=200 lux, medium natural light) ===
description: sun=2, both zones dark, all actuators off
sun=2, Z1 below target, Z2 at target
sun=2, both bright via corridor+Z1Light, must reduce Z2 to rank2
sun=2, Z1 below target, Z2 above target (Z2Blinds open pulling in sun)
sun=2, Z1 rank2 (below rank3 target), Z2 rank1 (need rank2)

comment: === SUNSHINE RANK 3 (Sunshine=700 lux, strong natural light) ===
description: sun=3, both zones dark, blinds closed (open blinds is the cheap witness)
sun=3, Z1 below target, Z2 at target
sun=3, both bright from blinds only, must decrease Z2 by closing Z2Blinds
sun=3, Z1 below target, Z2 above target (conflict: opening Z1Blinds bleeds into Z2)
sun=3, Z1 rank2 (below rank3 target), Z2 rank1 (need rank2) — strong sun available (blind is the cheap optimum)
